summary: Complete Stripe to Dodo Payments migration testing - All 382 vitest tests pass, all Stripe references removed, all Dodo components implemented correctly
passed_tests: No Stripe references remain in application code
Stripe files deleted: stripe-client.ts, stripe webhook route, stripe test file
Dodo client exports all required functions: getDodoKey, createDodoCheckout, getDodoSubscription, cancelDodoSubscription, createDodoCustomerPortal, verifyDodoWebhook, determinePlanFromProduct
Dodo webhook route exists with POST handler
Types updated to use dodoPriceId, dodoCustomerId, dodoSubscriptionId
Tier checker uses Dodo field names
.env.example has DODO_ vars, no STRIPE_ vars
wrangler.toml lists DODO_ secrets, no STRIPE_ secrets
Pricing page shows 'Powered by Dodo Payments' and payment badges (UPI, Cards, NetBanking, 150+ countries)
Dodo client tests exist and pass
Tier checker tests use Dodo field names
